tool.name: security_tool_doctor
tool.description: Check which first-class traditional security tools are available on PATH and capture lightweight version information so the agent can choose a realistic toolchain before scanning.

parameter.name: tool_names
parameter.description: Optional subset of supported tools to inspect. Supported values include arjun, bandit, dirsearch, ffuf, httpx, jwt_tool, katana, naabu, nuclei, nmap, semgrep, sqlmap, subfinder, trivy, trufflehog, wapiti, wafw00f, and zaproxy.

tool.name: run_security_tool_pipeline
tool.description: Run an opinionated multi-tool assessment pipeline that orchestrates wrapped recon, discovery, and code-scanning tools while keeping all step outputs normalized into the shared assessment ledger.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label used for all child runs, coverage, and evidence.

parameter.name: mode
parameter.description: Pipeline mode: blackbox, repo, or hybrid. Default: blackbox.

parameter.name: targets
parameter.description: Optional list of seed domains, hosts, or URLs for the blackbox part of the pipeline.

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Optional primary URL to include in the pipeline's live-target set.

parameter.name: target_path
parameter.description: Optional repository or filesystem path for the repo/hybrid part of the pipeline.

parameter.name: deep
parameter.description: Whether to include deeper enrichment and active scanning steps such as nmap default scripts, wapiti, and zaproxy. Default: false.

parameter.name: max_host_targets
parameter.description: Maximum number of host/domain targets to fan out into host-oriented scans. Default: 20.

parameter.name: max_live_targets
parameter.description: Maximum number of live URLs to fan out into crawl and nuclei steps. Default: 8.

parameter.name: max_active_targets
parameter.description: Maximum number of live URLs to fan out into per-URL active scanners such as arjun, dirsearch, wapiti, or zaproxy. Default: 3.

parameter.name: max_seed_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of discovery coverage items each child run should seed. Default: 25.

parameter.name: max_hypotheses
parameter.description: Maximum number of findings each child run should convert into hypotheses. Default: 12.

parameter.name: reuse_previous_runs
parameter.description: When true, reuse prior successful runs with the same normalized scope instead of rerunning them. Default: true.

parameter.name: auto_synthesize_hypotheses
parameter.description: When true, synthesize additional creative hypotheses from the resulting assessment state after the pipeline completes. Default: true.

tool.name: run_security_focus_pipeline
tool.description: Run a focused depth-first pipeline for a specific high-value bug class once broad recon has already surfaced leads. Supported focus values are auth_jwt, ssrf_oob, sqli, ssti, xxe, file_upload, path_traversal, authz, and workflow_race.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label used for all child runs, coverage, evidence, and hypotheses.

parameter.name: focus
parameter.description: Which depth-first focus pipeline to run: auth_jwt, ssrf_oob, sqli, ssti, xxe, file_upload, path_traversal, authz, or workflow_race.

parameter.name: targets
parameter.description: Optional list of seed domains, hosts, or URLs to bootstrap candidate surfaces before focusing.

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Optional primary URL for the focus pipeline. When omitted, the pipeline can derive candidate requests from runtime inventory, workflow traces, and saved session profiles.

parameter.name: target_path
parameter.description: Optional repository or source path for whitebox sink discovery that can bias focused blackbox validation toward template, XML, upload, or file-serving sinks.

parameter.name: headers
parameter.description: Optional HTTP headers used by auth/JWT, SQLi, and other focused follow-up steps.

parameter.name: jwt_token
parameter.description: JWT value to analyze with jwt_tool or to inject into an Authorization header when one was not explicitly supplied.

parameter.name: callback_base_url
parameter.description: Manual callback base URL for SSRF/OOB payload generation when interactsh is not desired.

parameter.name: canary_value
parameter.description: Optional canary value for jwt_tool exploit attempts.

parameter.name: public_key_path
parameter.description: Optional public key path for jwt_tool verification or key-confusion scenarios.

parameter.name: dictionary_path
parameter.description: Optional dictionary path for jwt_tool cracking mode.

parameter.name: max_active_targets
parameter.description: Maximum number of candidate URLs or URL/parameter pairs to deepen. Default: 3.

parameter.name: max_hypotheses
parameter.description: Maximum number of findings or synthesized ideas to promote into hypotheses. Default: 12.

parameter.name: reuse_previous_runs
parameter.description: When true, reuse prior successful runs with the same normalized scope instead of rerunning them. Default: true.

parameter.name: auto_synthesize_hypotheses
parameter.description: When true, synthesize additional creative hypotheses from the resulting assessment state after the focus pipeline completes. Default: true.

tool.name: run_security_tool_scan
tool.description: Run a supported traditional security tool and normalize the results into the assessment ledger, including discovery coverage, evidence, and hypotheses where appropriate.

parameter.name: tool_name
parameter.description: Which wrapped tool to run: arjun, bandit, dirsearch, ffuf, httpx, jwt_tool, katana, naabu, nuclei, nmap, semgrep, sqlmap, subfinder, trivy, trufflehog, wapiti, wafw00f, or zaproxy.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label used for coverage, evidence, and hypothesis recording.

parameter.name: component
parameter.description: Optional logical component label for the run record and evidence. Defaults to toolchain:<tool_name>.

parameter.name: targets
parameter.description: List-driven targets for supported tools, such as URLs for httpx/katana/nuclei, domains for subfinder, or hosts for naabu/nmap.

parameter.name: target_path
parameter.description: Filesystem path to scan with semgrep, bandit, or trufflehog.

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Single target URL for arjun, dirsearch, ffuf, sqlmap, wapiti, or zaproxy.

parameter.name: wordlist_path
parameter.description: Wordlist path for ffuf.

parameter.name: raw_request_path
parameter.description: Raw request file path for sqlmap.

parameter.name: paths
parameter.description: Optional path list for httpx probing.

parameter.name: headers
parameter.description: Optional HTTP header map for ffuf or sqlmap.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Optional request body data for arjun, ffuf, or sqlmap.

parameter.name: request_method
parameter.description: HTTP method for tools that support method-aware probing, such as arjun. Default: GET.

parameter.name: ports
parameter.description: Explicit port specification for naabu or nmap, such as 80,443,8080 or 1-1000.

parameter.name: top_ports
parameter.description: Top-ports profile size for naabu or nmap when explicit ports are not provided.

parameter.name: parameter
parameter.description: Specific parameter hint for sqlmap.

parameter.name: configs
parameter.description: Semgrep config or ruleset identifiers.

parameter.name: tags
parameter.description: Nuclei tag filters.

parameter.name: severities
parameter.description: Optional severity filters for nuclei or semgrep.

parameter.name: proxy_url
parameter.description: Optional explicit upstream proxy URL for the wrapped tool where supported.

parameter.name: automatic_scan
parameter.description: Enable Nuclei automatic-scan mode when tags are not provided. Default: false.

parameter.name: active_only
parameter.description: For recon tools that support it, restrict to actively verified results. Useful with subfinder. Default: false.

parameter.name: collect_sources
parameter.description: Include source metadata where the wrapped tool supports it. Useful with subfinder. Default: false.

parameter.name: no_interactsh
parameter.description: Disable Nuclei interactsh/OAST usage. Default: false.

parameter.name: use_js_crawl
parameter.description: Enable Katana JavaScript crawling. Default: true.

parameter.name: headless
parameter.description: Enable Katana headless crawling. Default: false.

parameter.name: known_files
parameter.description: Katana known-files mode such as robotstxt, sitemapxml, or all. Default: robotstxt.

parameter.name: recursion
parameter.description: Enable ffuf or dirsearch recursion. Default: false.

parameter.name: recursion_depth
parameter.description: ffuf or dirsearch recursion depth. Default: 2.

parameter.name: scan_type
parameter.description: Optional scan-mode override for tools such as naabu or nmap, for example connect, syn, or -sT.

parameter.name: host_discovery_disabled
parameter.description: Skip ping-based host discovery where the wrapped tool supports it. Default: true.

parameter.name: service_detection
parameter.description: Enable service detection for tools such as nmap. Default: false.

parameter.name: default_scripts
parameter.description: Enable default script execution for tools such as nmap. Default: false.

parameter.name: store_response
parameter.description: Store httpx responses alongside the run. Default: false.

parameter.name: flush_session
parameter.description: Flush sqlmap cached session state before running. Default: false.

parameter.name: threads
parameter.description: General thread count for supported tools. Default: 20.

parameter.name: rate_limit
parameter.description: Request rate cap for supported tools. Default: 50.

parameter.name: concurrency
parameter.description: Concurrency value for Katana, Nuclei, or Semgrep. Default: 20.

parameter.name: bulk_size
parameter.description: Nuclei bulk-size setting. Default: 20.

parameter.name: depth
parameter.description: Katana crawl depth. Default: 3.

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: Per-request or per-file timeout in seconds. Default: 10.

parameter.name: retries
parameter.description: Retry count. Default: 1.

parameter.name: max_time_minutes
parameter.description: Overall runtime cap in minutes for tools that support it, such as subfinder.

parameter.name: host_timeout
parameter.description: Host timeout string for tools such as nmap, for example 90s or 3m.

parameter.name: script_timeout
parameter.description: Script timeout string for tools such as nmap, for example 30s.

parameter.name: level
parameter.description: sqlmap testing level. Default: 2.

parameter.name: risk
parameter.description: sqlmap risk level. Default: 1.

parameter.name: zapit
parameter.description: Enable ZAP attack mode during quick scanning where supported. Default: false.

parameter.name: jwt_token
parameter.description: JWT value for jwt_tool when the token should be supplied directly instead of inferred from a request.

parameter.name: canary_value
parameter.description: Optional canary value for jwt_tool exploit attempts.

parameter.name: public_key_path
parameter.description: Optional public key path for jwt_tool verification or key-confusion checks.

parameter.name: dictionary_path
parameter.description: Optional dictionary path for jwt_tool cracking mode.

parameter.name: output_path
parameter.description: Optional explicit output file path instead of an autogenerated temp path.

parameter.name: include_findings
parameter.description: Whether to include normalized findings in the tool response. Default: false.

parameter.name: max_seed_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of discovery coverage items to seed from path-finding or parameter-discovery tools. Default: 25.

parameter.name: max_hypotheses
parameter.description: Maximum number of scanner or parameter-risk findings to convert into in-progress coverage plus open hypotheses. Default: 12.

tool.name: list_security_tool_runs
tool.description: List prior wrapped-tool runs for the current assessment root so follow-on agents can reuse findings and evidence instead of rerunning the same discovery blindly.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Optional logical target filter.

parameter.name: tool_name
parameter.description: Optional tool-name filter.

parameter.name: include_findings
parameter.description: Whether to include normalized findings in each returned run record. Default: false.

parameter.name: max_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of run records to return. Default: 25.
